title: Kangal Irandal Lyrics Subramaniapuram
stanzas:
Kangal irandaal
un kangal irandaal
ennai katti iluththai iluthaai
podhathena chinna sirippil
oru kalla sirippil
ennai thallivittu thalivittu
moodi maraithaai. (2)

pesa enni silanaal
arugil varuven
pinbu paarvai podhum
ena naan ninaippen
nagalvene.. maatri

kangal ezhudhum
iru kangal ezhudhum
oru vanna kavidhal
kadhal thaanaa
oru vaarthai illaiye
idhil osai illaiye
idhai irulilum
padithida mudigirathe.

iravum allaatha
pagalum allaatha
pozhudhugal unnodu
kaliyumaa

thodavum koodaatha
padavum koodaatha
idaiveli appodhu
kuraiyumaa

madiyinil saaindhida
thudikkudhe
marupuram naanamum
thadukkuthe
idhu varai yaaridamum
sollaatha kadhai.

Kangal irandaal
un kangal irandaal
ennai katti iluththai iluthaai
podhathena chinna sirippil
oru kalla sirippil
ennai thallivittu thalivittu
moodi maraithaai

karaigal andaatha
kaatrum theendaatha
manadhirukkum eppodhu
nulaindhittaai

udalum allaadha
uruvam kollaatha
kadavulai  pol vandhu
kalandhittaai

unai andri veroru
ninaivillai.
ini indha oonuyir
enadhillai.

kangal ezhudhum
iru kangal ezhudhum
oru vanna kavidhal
kadhal thaanaa
oru vaarthai illaiye
idhil osai illaiye
idhai irulilum
padithida mudigirathe.

pesa enni silanaal
arugil varuven
pinbu paarvai podhum
ena naan ninaippen
nagarvene.. maatri

Kangal irandaal
un kangal irandaal
ennai katti iluththai iluthaai
podhathena chinna sirippil
oru kalla sirippil
ennai thallivittu thalivittu
moodi maraithaai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kangal Irandal?

The song is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the emotions of love and longing.

In which movie does Kangal Irandal appear?

The song is featured in the movie Subramaniapuram.

When was Kangal Irandal released?

The song was released in 2008.

Who are the singers of Kangal Irandal?

The singers of the song are not specified in the provided details.

What emotions does Kangal Irandal evoke?

The song evokes feelings of love, nostalgia, and serenity.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kangal Irandal is a romantic melody from the movie Subramaniapuram, capturing the essence of love through its soothing and heartfelt composition. The song's lyrics express deep emotions of longing and affection, making it a favorite among couples. Its gentle tunes and evocative words create a serene atmosphere, perfect for moments of reflection and romance. This classic duet continues to resonate with listeners, evoking nostalgia and warmth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kangal Irandal from the movie Subramaniapuram is a timeless romantic melody that captures the essence of love with its soothing tunes. The song beautifully blends heartfelt lyrics with a mesmerizing composition, making it a favorite among lovers. Dive into this enchanting track and experience the magic of love through music.
stanzaMeanings: When your eyes look at me, they pull me in and hide me with a playful smile and a mischievous grin.
I think of talking to you and coming closer, but then I feel your glance is enough and I smile to myself.
The eyes write a colorful poem of love without words or sound, and it can be read even in the dark.
The time that is neither day nor night is fun with you.
The distance that can't be touched or crossed, does it lessen then?
I long to rest on your shoulder, but shyness holds me back. It's a story I've never told anyone.
When your eyes look at me, they pull me in and hide me with a playful smile and a mischievous grin.
You come into my heart like a breeze that can't be touched.
You blend into me like a form that isn't physical, like a god that can't be captured.
I have no other thoughts but you. Now, this life is not mine without you.
Even in death, I will come with you.
The eyes write a colorful poem of love without words or sound, and it can be read even in the dark.
I think of talking to you and coming closer, but then I feel your glance is enough and I smile to myself.
When your eyes look at me, they pull me in and hide me with a playful smile and a mischievous grin.
